allow:
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/v1/chat \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"riderId":"test123","message":"测试消息"}' | head -5)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/v1/suggestions/batch \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{
    "suggestions": [
      { "title": "查看我的订单", "content": "查看我的订单", "icon": "📋", "category": "order", "sortOrder": 1 },
      { "title": "查询配送进度", "content": "查询配送进度", "icon": "📍", "category": "delivery", "sortOrder": 2 },
      { "title": "费用相关问题", "content": "费用相关问题", "icon": "💰", "category": "payment", "sortOrder": 3 },
      { "title": "投诉与建议", "content": "投诉与建议", "icon": "💬", "category": "support", "sortOrder": 4 },
      { "title": "如何修改配送地址", "content": "如何修改配送地址", "icon": "🏠", "category": "delivery", "sortOrder": 5 },
      { "title": "联系人工客服", "content": "联系人工客服", "icon": "🎧", "category": "support", "sortOrder": 6 },
      { "title": "查看配送时间", "content": "查看配送时间", "icon": "⏰", "category": "delivery", "sortOrder": 7 },
      { "title": "退款问题", "content": "退款问题", "icon": "💳", "category": "payment", "sortOrder": 8 }
    ]
  }')

Bash(curl -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/v1/documents/upload \\
  -F "file=@test_document.txt" \\
  -F "title=外卖骑手知识库测试" \\
  -F "category=training" \\
  -F "uploadedBy=admin")

Bash(echo "=== 检查 MinIO 容器环境变量 ==="
docker inspect minio --format='{{range .Config.Env}}{{println .}}{{end}}' | grep -i minio)

Bash(DOC_ID="doc_0b314eaa-3784-4b55-bd68-ca04ef5b0715" echo "=== 等待文档处理完成 ===" sleep 8 __NEW_LINE_8151a88075f4ebcb__ echo "=== 检查文档状态 ===" curl -s "http://localhost:3001/api/documents/$DOC_ID/status")
Bash(jq '.data | {doc_id, title, status, chunk_count, error_message}' __NEW_LINE_8151a88075f4ebcb__ echo -e "\\n=== 检查 ChromaDB 统计 ===" curl -s "http://localhost:3001/api/knowledge/stats")
